# Canonical UTF-8, repository-relative input paths for wyst.language-snapshot.v1.
# Blank lines and lines beginning with # are not inputs. The build canonicalizer
# sorts paths by their UTF-8 bytes and rejects duplicates, missing paths, and
# paths outside the repository. This manifest is itself an input.
